category_sources: source_facts.description says source code tag system; official GNU GLOBAL page describes it as a source code tagging system for locating objects in source files.
display_name_sources: Official GNU and Savannah pages use GNU GLOBAL as the project name; source_facts.name is global.
docs_sources: Official GNU GLOBAL manual page and tutorial/table-of-contents page provide documentation.
repo_sources: Official GNU GLOBAL download page and Savannah project page identify the official CVS source repository on Savannah.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GNU GLOBAL and Savannah pages describe source tagging, code navigation, ctags/etags-like behavior, and command-line tools.
